scenario.title: Roommate Dispute Over Cleanliness
scenario.description: Two college roommates argue about the state of their shared living space after one leaves a mess in the kitchen.

traits.background: raised in a tidy household, values order
grew up in a relaxed home, dislikes confrontation

scenario.title: First Date Icebreaker
scenario.description: Two strangers meet for a coffee date arranged online, trying to make a good impression.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: nervous excitement → awkward small talk → genuine connection

traits.background: recently out of a long relationship, eager to meet new people
shy but hoping to find a partner, anxious about saying the wrong thing

scenario.title: Boss Gives Negative Feedback
scenario.description: A manager calls an employee into a meeting to discuss performance issues on a recent project.

traits.background: worked up the corporate ladder, expects high standards
has been working hard but made a critical mistake

scenario.title: Parent Grounds Teen for Breaking Curfew
scenario.description: A teenager arrives home an hour late and is confronted by an angry parent.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: anger/defiance → argument → guilt on both sides

traits.background: strict upbringing, worries about safety
seeks independence, feels parent is too controlling

scenario.title: Customer Service Complaint
scenario.description: A frustrated customer calls a helpline about a defective product and speaks to a tired support agent.

traits.background: had multiple bad experiences with the company
works long hours, trained to de-escalate

scenario.title: Sibling Inheritance Feud
scenario.description: Two adult siblings argue over their late mother’s estate after the will favors one.

traits.background: was the primary caregiver for the mother
feels betrayed, always had a strained relationship with mother

scenario.title: Friend Admits to Lying
scenario.description: One friend confesses to a lie that hurt the other, trying to repair the friendship.

traits.background: values friendship but made a mistake out of fear
has been lied to before, finds it hard to trust

scenario.title: Teacher and Struggling Student
scenario.description: A student asks for extra help after failing a test; the teacher suspects lack of effort.

traits.background: has taught for 20 years, sees many excuses
faces learning difficulties but is too embarrassed to admit

scenario.title: Neighborhood Noise Complaint
scenario.description: One neighbor knocks on the door of another after loud music keeps them awake.

traits.background: works early mornings, values quiet
throws parties frequently, inconsiderate of others

scenario.title: Therapist and Reluctant Client
scenario.description: A therapist tries to build rapport with a client who was forced into therapy by their spouse.

traits.background: experienced in couples and individual therapy
feels misunderstood, thinks therapy is useless
